title: Bloom Energy (BE) Earnings Report Dates and Forecasts
text: Nasdaq's earnings calendar and forecast data for Bloom Energy provides consolidated view of earnings expectations and company guidance. The next Bloom Energy earnings call is scheduled for July 30, 2026, when executives will discuss Q2 2026 financial results and updated guidance. Current consensus analyst EPS estimate for next quarter is $0.35 based on aggregated Wall Street estimates. Quarterly revenue expectations are approximately $798.31 million with estimate range of $615 million to $944.51 million, reflecting analyst uncertainty regarding quarter-to-quarter variability. Historical earnings surprises show Bloom consistently exceeds analyst expectations, with Q1 2026 demonstrating 340% earnings beat. The pattern of positive earnings surprises suggests either conservative analyst modeling or strong management execution. For full-year 2026, consensus earnings estimates have been rising throughout the quarter as management provided updated guidance. Current full-year 2026 consensus EPS estimate reflects analyst confidence in company's ability to achieve raised guidance. Analysts project earnings growth of 43.9% and revenue growth of 27.8% per annum through 2030. The long-term growth projections reflect belief in sustained AI data center tailwinds supporting Bloom's business.
